_description: Canonical brand registry for the Idea Loop (docs/IDEA_LOOP.md). Routing layer L1: every idea maps to exactly one brand; every brand carries ICP, voice, experience goal, repos, domains, and publish surfaces. Domains marked verify:true must be confirmed live before linking publicly.

defaults.design_language: minimal, liquid-glass, restraint over decoration, dark-first

brands.name: FrankX
brands.icp: Creators, entrepreneurs, and operators who want practical AI systems — a personal AI Center of Excellence — not another tool subscription.
brands.voice: Elite creator, AI architect, humble excellence. Direct, technical, warm. Results first; show don't tell. No guru language.
surfaces: frankx.ai pages via two-repo sync (FrankX → frankx.ai-vercel-website)

brands.name: Agentic Creator OS
brands.icp: AI-powered creators and builders installing a skill/agent/workflow OS into their coding harness of choice.
brands.voice: Frank DNA: direct, technical, warm, playful. Pattern recognition as poetry. Help people build their own system.

brands.name: Starlight Intelligence
brands.icp: Agent-systems builders who need persistent memory, protocol-level attestation, and multi-agent orchestration substrate.
brands.voice: Architect register: precise, protocol-minded, canon-free functional names. Substrate before story.

brands.name: Arcanea
brands.icp: Creators and worldbuilders co-creating with AI inside a living universe — fiction, music, art, and lore with canon discipline.
brands.voice: Elevated but accessible, arcane + authoritative, mythic but practical. Canon per CANON_LOCKED.md.

brands.name: Music Intelligence / AI Music Academy
brands.icp: Musicians and producers using AI (Suno-class tools) to compose, release, and grow a catalog with professional discipline.
brands.voice: Producer-grade: technical, encouraging, zero hype. Teach the craft, show the chain.

brands.name: Agentic Income
brands.icp: Solopreneurs and operators building agent-run income systems — leverage without headcount, fail-closed money handling.
brands.voice: Grounded operator: numbers, mechanisms, receipts. No passive-income hype; agents draft, humans approve capital.

brands.name: Mind Intelligence
brands.icp: Builders of personal mind/second-brain systems who want cognitive models that observe and predict — never diagnose.
brands.voice: Direct, technical, warm; five-stage discipline (observe → interpret → hypothesize → evidence → decide). Non-clinical, non-waivable.

brands.name: Ocean / Blue Life
brands.icp: Marine-curious builders and ocean advocates who want intelligence systems applied to the blue world.
brands.voice: Wonder grounded in data. Educate through the ocean's own scale.

routing.rule: Match idea keywords against brands[].keywords; tie-break by repo affinity of the current session; if no match, capture in fallback_repo and route during L2 reasoning.
